metadata.title: Marketing Agency | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered marketing agency management platform for all your creative operations — from website builder and project management to CRM, invoicing, and campaign tracking.

hero.title: Marketing Agency
hero.description: AdonERP allows you to streamline all aspects of your marketing agency on one intuitive platform, from building websites to managing projects, client communication and invoicing.
hero.testimonialQuote: With most systems, you get 70% of what you hoped. With AdonERP, you get more than what you expected. It transformed our agency operations.

cards.website: Create a stunning website using AdonERP's AI-based builder, add photos, drag-and-drop elements, and SEO optimization tools.
cards.templates: Use templates and customization tools to showcase your agency services in a clear, polished way.

projectSection.title: All-in-one
projectSection.description: Manage projects, tasks, timesheets, meetings, documents and team expenses from one complete dashboard.

pipelineSection.title: From lead to
pipelineSection.description: Centralize leads, send invoices to clients in one click, and choose the best payment methods for your agency.

expandSection.title: Expand as you grow
expandSection.description: Marketing warehouse apps centralize all your tools in one platform, automate scheduling, create events, and track campaign performance.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Practical tools for agency websites, services, sales, automation, purchasing and recurring billing.

list.title: Website builder
list.description: Create stunning agency websites with drag-and-drop tools and AI assistance.

list.title: Product configurator
list.description: Build customizable service packages for different client needs.

list.title: Pricelists
list.description: Set flexible pricing by client tier, service type, or campaign.

list.title: Automated delivery
list.description: Auto-send deliverables and reports to clients upon completion.

list.title: Recurring invoices
list.description: Set up subscription billing for retainer clients.

list.title: Easy purchasing
list.description: Manage vendor orders for ad spend, printing, and tools.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your agency, client management, projects, and billing.

testimonials.name: Michael Bennett
testimonials.content: With most systems, you get 70% of what you hoped. With AdonERP, you get more than what you expected. It transformed our agency operations.

testimonials.name: Jessica Taylor
testimonials.content: From project management to recurring invoices, AdonERP streamlined everything. Our team is more productive and clients love the transparency.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for marketing agencies and creative studios.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a marketing agency workflow that helps you manage clients, track campaigns, and deliver exceptional results.
